title: cyrtochilum rigidum
intro: Cyrtochilum rigidum is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyrtochilum rigidum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Cyrtochilum rigidum are typically made by drying the plant's roots and leaves, and can be consumed as teas or infusions.
